name: Woven Desk Tool Holder Taupe - Threshold™: Pencil & Pen Holder, Desk Organizer, Office Supplies,
description:
You're sure to appreciate the organization this Woven Desk Tool Holder from Threshold™ brings to your work desk. Made from paper and cardboard, this stylish desk tool organizer features a free-standing design and a diagonal partition for organizing pens, pencils, brushes, highlighters and other writing or small craft essentials. Showcasing a woven design in a taupe hue with a brown faux-leather accent on the front, it's sure to bring sleek style to your workstation or table.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
